Goal:
- Using UI Framework without change
- Resolve conflict between old version instruction and update code


Code update to 
https://www.mql5.com/en/articles/3527

1. Update Enum.mqh
//To Avoid Duplicate with buildin ENUM_SORT_MODE Change To ENUM_UI_SORT_MODE
-Change ENUM_SORT_MODE to ENUM_UI_SORT_MODE
-Change Table.mqh CTable class as Follow


2. Update Element.mqh CElement class

-using CElementBase::IsLocked;
-Update m_main.  ->m_main->


4. Update class CButton : public |CElement
